items.title: For the first time, 50% of employed US adults say they use AI at work a few times per year or more; leaders are more likely to see AI's impact as positive (Andy Kemp/Gallup)

items.title_zh: 首次有 50% 的美国成年人表示，他们每年在工作中使用人工智能几次或更多次；领导者更有可能认为人工智能的影响是积极的（Andy Kemp/Gallup）
items.title_bilingual: 首次有 50% 的美国成年人表示，他们每年在工作中使用人工智能几次或更多次；领导者更有可能认为人工智能的影响是积极的（Andy Kemp/Gallup） / For the first time, 50% of employed US adults say they use AI at work a few times per year or more; leaders are more likely to see AI's impact as positive (Andy Kemp/Gallup)
